overall.description: First-person walkthrough of a cyberpunk city street in a video game (Cyberpunk 2077), featuring a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, neon-lit industrial buildings, scattered pedestrians, and futuristic vehicles. The camera moves steadily along the pavement, passing trash and debris, before tilting up to reveal a large corporate sign.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk city sidewalk beneath elevated highway with neon commercial signage

events.description: begins steady forward movement along the sidewalk
pedestrian in brown jacket passes close to camera on the right side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a building with green neon YAKEDA signage, glancing at passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red shirt standing near the curb looking at street traffic
pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward camera with arms crossed

entered.detail: large industrial building with green metal facade, YAKEDA neon signage, and horizontal metal railings
curved concrete elevated highway structure with green supports running overhead
tall building with large purple and white digital advertising screens
green metal railing separating the sidewalk from the red bike lane and street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cyberpunk city sidewalk with the camera walking forward. To the left, a large industrial building displays bright green YAKEDA neon signage. An elevated highway curves overhead, casting partial shadows. Sparse pedestrians walk in opposing directions, and futuristic vehicles pass on the street to the right. Trash and debris are scattered across the concrete pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with digital advertising kiosk and traffic monitoring equipment

events.description: passing tall digital advertising kiosk with illuminated portrait screen
passing digital speed limit sign displaying 40

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk at steady pace, navigating around pedestrians while passing a digital kiosk and speed limit sign

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in pink shirt and shorts walking toward camera on the sidewalk
pedestrian in blue shirt and cap walking past the camera

entered.detail: tall vertical digital advertising display with portrait-oriented screen showing a woman's face
digital speed limit sign mounted on a pole displaying the number 40

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking along the sidewalk, now passing a digital advertising kiosk on the right that displays a portrait advertisement. The YAKEDA building section is left behind as the camera moves past a digital speed limit sign showing 40. The elevated highway structure is now closer on the left side. Pedestrians continue to pass by in both directions, and the street maintains light traffic with futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching large corporate building signage on industrial facade

events.description: camera tilts sharply upward to focus on the large DTR corporate sign on the building facade
pedestrian passes extremely close to camera on the left, temporarily blocking view

agents.ego_description: walking forward then stopping to tilt head upward, examining the large DTR corporate signage on the building

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark jacket and red cap walking toward camera, passing very close

entered.detail: massive white painted corporate logo reading DTR DECKER TANAKA & ROGERS on the green industrial building facade

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the camera approaches a large section of the building featuring a massive white DTR corporate sign reading DECKER TANAKA & ROGERS. The camera tilts upward to focus on this signage, revealing the full scale of the painted logo against the green industrial facade. The elevated highway is now further in the background, and the sidewalk appears narrower as the camera moves closer to the building wall. A pedestrian passes very close to the camera before the view tilts up to the sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a gritty cyberpunk sidewalk that transitions from a neon-lit industrial stretch to a focused view of a massive corporate monolith. It begins by moving forward past a building adorned with bright green YAKEDA neon signage, while an elevated highway curves overhead and futuristic vehicles glide through the street to the right. As the camera advances, the YAKEDA building recedes and the view shifts past a digital advertising kiosk and a speed limit sign, with the highway structure looming closer on the left. The scene then narrows as the camera approaches a large industrial facade, passing a close-proximity pedestrian before finally tilting upward to reveal the towering white DECKER TANAKA & ROGERS corporate sign.
